flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Arkansas State University-Beebe rose 34% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.1k → $8.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arkansas State University-Beebe rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Arkansas State University-Beebe fell 14% between 2007 and 2010 (35.6% → 30.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arkansas State University-Beebe rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.2k).
